news.t: They may be attracting big money, but these ETFs may not be as eco-friendly as you think

holdings.infoBox: EFIV is an equity ETF with a total of 333 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 12.59%, Microsoft at 7.33%, Alphabet at 5.31%, Alphabet at 4.25%, and Micron Technology at 2.79%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 500 ESG ETF (EFIV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Scored & Screened index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index of S&P 500 stocks that are screened for sustainability criteria related to ESG factors. EFIV was launched on Jul 27, 2020 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: They may be attracting big money, but these ETFs may not be as eco-friendly as you think
data.text: Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) ETFs lack clarity, so investors don't always know where their money is going, S&P Global's Mona Naqvi warns.
